g.title: battery
g.text: Battery (12 V, neg. ground) ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: gnd-eng
g.text: Ground HUB — engine bay / battery ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.text: Turn-signal LEFT relay ↗ Main loom (engine-bay hub)

g.title: rly-turnR
